name_en: Top-tier replica M59886 White & Pink The iconic Twist small bag is derived into a detachable mini clutch, cleverly fixed to the strap or used separately as a card and coin purse. Epi leather creates a flexible structure, with the LV Twist lock continuing the classic element. Dimensions: 19 x 15 x 9 cm
